column1: # Source: USPS Publication 199 — Intelligent Mail Package Barcode (IMpb)
#   Implementation Guide for Confirmation Services and Electronic Verification System
#   - Appendix G-4: USPS Domestic Tracking Scan Events (72 个 2 位数字 event code)
#     (2019 v20 老版本，含完整 G-4 表；最新 v34 已把 G-4 移到 PostalPro 单独 PDF)
#   - Appendix G-5: Scan Event Codes – International Mail (~50 个 2-字符 alpha event code)
#     来源 PDF: infor/usps/Pub 199_v34_04012026.pdf (v34 最新版仍含完整 G-5)
# Coverage: ✅ W3 complete — 122 条 USPS 官方 PTR Event Codes
#   - 国内 72 条 (Appendix G-4，使用 2 位数字代码 01-89)
#   - 国际 50 条 (Appendix G-5，使用 2 字符 alpha 代码 A0/AR/B1/CO 等)
#   两套互不冲突（域内数字 vs 国际字母）；H0/H8 国际拒投 Action+Reason 子码组合
#   60+ 条暂未纳入（消费方很少直接消费此细粒度），可在 v0.2 扩展。
# Note: USPS Tracking API 的 trackingEvents[].eventCode 字段返回这些原始代码。
#       消费方应优先使用 eventCode 做事件 timeline 主轴。同 event code 在 USPS
#       多种 description 子类型下复用（如 01 涵盖 14+ 种"投递到 X"子分类），
#       本映射取 Status Category 高层归类，sub-type 细节归 description 字段。

column2: Delivered (multiple sub-types: mailbox / front door / parcel locker / individual / agent / etc.)

column4: Notice left family base; codes 51-56 are sub-reason variants

column2: Unable to deliver - problem with address

column4: 通过 USPS 分拣中心处理
常与 01 配对（认证签收）

column2: Unclaimed (max hold time expired) - return to sender
USPS hand off to shipping partner
Held at post office customer request
Retrieved from parcel locker (physical out delivery scan)
Tendered to agent for final delivery
Attempted delivery abroad (multiple sub-codes by Action/Reason)

column4: H8 family has multiple Action+Reason sub-combinations

column2: Arrival at transit office from exchange
Depart from transit office of exchange
EPG origin post is preparing shipment
